title: fr-author input envelope
description: Input contract for cuo/cpo/fr-author. The CUO supervisor (or a direct caller) builds an instance of this envelope and passes it to the skill. Validated at CONTRACT_ECHO time; bootstrap failures map to BOOT-001..008 per references/FAILURE_MODES.md.
_note: batch_size, caller_persona, trace_id, chain_to are optional with documented defaults. Aligned with SKILL.md frontmatter expects.required_fields + expects.optional_fields per registry v0.2.1 audit.

path.description: Relative path readable by the skill's runtime.

output_dir.description: Directory the skill MUST write FR markdowns + manifest into. The skill MUST NOT touch any path outside this directory (per references/UNTRUSTED_CONTENT.md §12.6).

manifest_path.description: Path to the fr-manifest@2 state file. Default: <output_dir>/manifest.json.

batch_size.description: Number of FRs to generate this WORKER batch. Soft-cap 5; hard-cap 10.

caller_persona.description: Persona ID of the caller. Used in the genie.action_log row's persona_id field. Defaults to 'cuo' (the outer surface) when invoked directly.

trace_id.description: UUID for genie.action_log correlation across the entire pipeline (fr-author + fr-audit + downstream).

chain_to.description: Optional. Skills the supervisor should invoke after this one. Default: ['cuo/cpo/fr-audit']. Empty list disables chaining (standalone create).
